text:
ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn (Instrumental) is the 12th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Musical motifs

The track is an instrumental version of ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn , and therefore a remix of ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn.

All occurrences

Episode 53 - Eren engages the Colossal Titan
Episode 54 - Eren and Armin launch their counterattack against the Colossal Titan
